response.original_title: Lucky Strike: When the Americans Came to Sweden
response.overview: Lucky Strike: When the Americans Came to Our Village is a World War II documentary film by Jan-Olof Nilsson based on his 2013 book about the Allied crews who, after bombing missions deep into Germany, desperately flew to Sweden when their planes were too damaged by flak or fighters to make it back to England.
response.title: Lucky Strike: When the Americans Came to Sweden
